images.title: Littoral à la Pointe de Corsen (Ifremer 00702-81428 - 34062).jpg
images.description: Pointe de Corsen is a cape located in the commune of Plouarzel, in Finistère, France. The point is the westernmost point of mainland metropolitan France.
